name: Blackberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until mixture resembles large coarse crumbs.
3. Sprinkle cold water over flour mixture, stirring gently to make it gather into a ball (the less water the better - just enough to hold it together).
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and shape with your hands into two balls; one slightly larger than the other.
5. Chill dough for 1 hour, then roll out large ball to fit the bottom of a 9 or 10-inch pie dish.
6. In a separate bowl, mix sugar and all-purpose flour, then add a dash of salt and stir in berries.
7. Pour mixture into the empty pie shell.
8. Roll out remaining ball of dough to make top crust.
9. Crimp and trim edges.
10. Slash the top crust in several places.
11. Bake in a preheated 375 degree oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Makes 1 - 10-inch pie.
